app.page_title: Meme Detector — Spot Gems in Memecoins
app.about: Meme Detector analyzes thousands of memecoins with ML to find the next 10x+ gems.
app.sidebar_description: **Gem Detector** - Machine Learning tool to analyze memecoins and detect which ones have potential to be 'gems' (10x+).

auth.login_subtitle: Memecoin Gem Detector powered by Machine Learning
auth.password_hint: Minimum 8 characters, at least one uppercase letter and one number
auth.reset_email_label: Enter your email to reset your password
auth.reset_success: We have sent you an email to reset your password. Check your inbox.
auth.register_success: Account created. Check your email to confirm and then you can log in.
auth.tos_notice: By creating your account you accept the Terms of Service.
auth.error_already_registered: This email is already registered. Try logging in.
auth.error_password_length: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
auth.error_password_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
auth.error_password_digit: Password must contain at least one number.
auth.error_no_password_configured: DASHBOARD_PASSWORD not configured on the server.

paywall.payments_coming_soon: Payments coming soon. We are setting up the subscription system. Contact info@memedetector.es for more information.
paywall.signals_limited: Showing {visible} of {total} signals. Subscribe to Pro to see all.
paywall.requires_pro_generic: This feature requires a Pro subscription.

pro.signals_subtitle: Tokens with the highest probability of being gems, detected by our ML model. Updated daily at 07:00 UTC.
pro.no_signals:
:hourglass_flowing_sand: **No signals available at this time.**

The model runs daily at 07:00 UTC. Signals will appear here automatically after each analysis.
pro.no_filtered_signals: No signals match the selected filters.
pro.export_csv_help: Download current signals as a CSV file.
pro.export_pro_only: CSV export available with Pro subscription.
pro.kpi_total_help: Total number of tokens analyzed with active signal.
pro.kpi_best_help: Highest probability assigned by the model today.
pro.kpi_chains_help: Number of blockchains with signals (Solana, Ethereum, Base).
pro.col_score_help: Probability of being a gem (0% - 100%). Higher = better.
pro.col_dex_help: View on DexScreener for more token info.
pro.disclaimer:
:warning: **This is NOT financial advice.**

Memecoins are extremely volatile and most lose all their value. This model's signals are analysis tools, not investment recommendations. Do your own research (DYOR) and never invest more than you can afford to lose.
pro.shap_desc: Which factors most influenced the prediction for this token. Positive values push toward 'gem', negative toward 'not gem'.
pro.shap_top5: Top 5 factors that influenced the prediction
pro.shap_top5_importance: Top 5 most important features for the prediction
pro.shap_fallback_note: Note: general model importance (not individual SHAP). Importance indicates how much the model uses each feature in its decisions.
pro.shap_unavailable: Could not calculate SHAP explanation for this token.
pro.shap_model_no_importances: This model does not support feature explanation.
pro.watchlist_desc: **What is this?** Your personal token watchlist. Add tokens from the Token Search page to follow their price, liquidity and activity evolution.
pro.watchlist_hint: Go to **Token Search**, find a token and click 'Add to Watchlist' to start monitoring.
